description_long: This skateboard features a classic double-kick deck with a sleek, black surface and rounded ends, typical of street and park skateboards. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, with a visible thin edge of natural wood color beneath the black top. The skateboard is equipped with two sets of red wheels, each mounted on metal trucks that are partially visible from the side. The wheels are small and hard, suitable for tricks and urban riding. The top of the deck is covered in a solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. There are no visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements on the deck or wheels, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist black skateboard with a double-kick deck, red wheels, and solid black grip tape. The design is clean and functional, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, red wheels, and a thin natural wood edge.
description_view_1: End view displaying the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the deck, wheels, and wood edge.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, similar to view 1, highlighting the deck's width and grip tape.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, solid red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, low-profile metal trucks, no visible branding, silver color
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
